meaning: n.獾,獾皮毛vt.迫使(某人吐露实话),诱使(某人暴露自己)
examples: Fox, badger, and weasel are regularly seen here.
Reporters constantly badger her about her private life.
Nouri studied at the University of Wisconsin and still refers to himself as a Badger.
Either way, Bitcoin is the honey badger of currencies and the protocol rolls on.
